description_long: This humanoid robot has a weathered, greenish exterior with a patchwork of torn and damaged sections, revealing internal endoskeleton and wiring. Its body is humanoid, with two arms and two legs, and the head features two long, asymmetrical rabbit-like ears, one of which is partially broken. The face is hollow-eyed, with large, empty sockets and a gaping mouth, giving it a haunting, animatronic appearance. The limbs are segmented and jointed, with visible mechanical components and exposed metal at the joints and feet. The torso and limbs are riddled with holes and tears, suggesting significant wear or damage, and the feet are flat and rectangular, resembling mechanical platforms. The overall look is unsettling, with a mix of synthetic and mechanical elements, and the robot appears to be designed for mobility and interaction.
description: A damaged, green humanoid robot with rabbit-like ears, hollow eyes, and exposed mechanical parts, featuring torn and worn exterior panels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face with hollow eyes, gaping mouth, and asymmetrical rabbit ears, as well as the torn, patchy torso and limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the protruding ear, and the depth of the torso and limbs, with visible internal damage.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth back of the head and torso, with fewer holes but visible wear, and the backs of the segmented arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head and body, with additional visible tears and exposed internal structure.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly out to the sides, legs straight, head facing forward, and ears in an upright but damaged position.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated, torn green panels with exposed mechanical and synthetic components.
attribute_facial_features: Face has large, hollow eye sockets, a wide open mouth, and no visible nose; features are mechanical and non-expressive, with a damaged, unsettling appearance.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs are segmented with visible hinge and rotary joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, allowing for a wide range of motion; hands and feet are blocky and mechanical.
